reviews.comment:
Son las 8 de la mañana de un domingo y todavía no abrió la full. Terminamos volviendo y desayunando en la Axión

(Translated by Google)
It's 8 a.m. on a Sunday and the gas station still hasn't opened. We end up going back and having breakfast at the Axion.

reviews.comment:
8.15 de la mañana en plena temporada turística y cerrada la full. Varios esperando afuera para desayunar. Desacertado!

(Translated by Google)
8:15 a.m. in the middle of tourist season and the restaurant was closed. Several people were waiting outside for breakfast. A poor choice!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbV9UaXlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con combustible Súper, premium, Diesel y euro diesel. No tiene GNC. Tiene el FULL donde podes desayunar o merendar y/o comer hamburguesas entre las opciones mas conocidas. Tambien cuenta con baños impecables. Al costado izquierdo tiene un campito con césped y juegos para niños. Hay lugares para estacionar y también para inflar los neumáticos (sin ficha).
¡¡Excelente!!

(Translated by Google)
Gas station with Super, Premium, Diesel, and Euro Diesel fuel. It does not have CNG. It has a FULL gas station where you can have breakfast or a snack, and/or hamburgers, among the most popular options. It also has impeccable restrooms. On the left side, there is a small grassy field with children's playground. There are parking spaces and tire inflation (no token required).
Excellent!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX2ZPQnhRRRAB
